text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home after work, I spot Symboli
Rudolf sitting in the spectator seats. She seems a
little dejected.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Looking down on the track from up here, it's as if
I can see shadows of the past brought back to
life.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Some that are still running even now, full of vim
and vigor... and others that I'll never see again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And then, this feeling of helplessness overwhelms
me. Dwelling on it only keeps me from moving
forward, I know.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But at times, regret assails me all the same.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I still have a long way to go, don't I?
